title: ICAR-CIRB Hisar Recruitment 2026, Vacancy for Young Professional-II posts Salary ₹42,000 -
organization: ICAR-Central Institute for Research on Buffaloes (ICAR-CIRB), Hisar
how_to_apply: Eligible/Interested candidates can apply using the link given below. Download the Form: visit the official website………………… Fill the form in BLOCK CAPITAL letters carefully, and provide accurate personal, educational, and professional details. Attach all documents: Include Self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, Fee Receipt , and age proof (Aadhar, PAN, etc.). The envelope containing the application should be superscribed as “Application for the post of ___________________”. Send Application Form: recruitment.cirb@gmail.com

vacancy_details.eligibility: Post Graduate in Life Sciences (with Genetics or Zoology or Biochemistry as one of the subjects)/Biotechnology/Nanotechnology/Medical Biotechnology with at least 60% marks or equivalent with one year experience in the relevant field OR BVSc & AH or Master’s Degree in any stream of Biological Sciences.
